name: hem-workspace
description: Workspace for Hem CLI, TUI, core, and desktop apps.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd apps/tui build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd apps/tui test && bun run --cwd apps/cli test && bun run --cwd apps/desktop test
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run test
scripts.demo:gate2:vhs: bun run demo:pain:vhs && bun run demo:fix:vhs
